name: Sprout LA
description: Restaurant development and incubation. Helps chefs launch concepts, then steps back. Chait has since departed.

name: ThinkFoodGroup
description: Jose Andres's restaurant group. DC-based. Backed original Somni at SLS Beverly Hills.

name: B&B Hospitality Group
description: Bastianich family Italian hospitality empire. NYC-based. Partners with Nancy Silverton on Mozza group.

name: Last Word Hospitality
description: Founded 2014. Backs chef-driven concepts: Found Oyster, Rasarumah, Barra Santos, Queen St., Shins Pizza, The Copper Room. 2026 JBF semifinalist: Outstanding Restaurateur.

name: Jon Shook & Vinny Dotolo
description: Animal, Son of a Gun, Jon & Vinny's, Trois Familia. Former Kismet partners (split 2021).

name: Francis Miranda
description: Restaurateur partnering with chefs on casual-to-fine concepts. Also behind Trophies Burger Club.

name: Thomas Keller Restaurant Group
description: French Laundry, Per Se, Bouchon, Ad Hoc. Training ground for multiple LA chefs.

name: Alinea Group
description: Alinea, Next, The Aviary, Roister. Training ground for Dave Beran and Jordan Kahn.

name: Wolfgang Puck Fine Dining Group
description: Spago, CUT, and global operations. Training ground for Nancy Silverton and Michael Cimarusti.
